headline: Realty Income (O) Announces Michelle Bushore’s Resignation, Search for Chief Legal Officer Successor

headline: The Portfolio Shift That Turns $500K Into a Reliable Monthly Paycheck
summary: There is a reason why the $500,000 number keeps showing up in retirement conversation as it’s not an aspirational number or a round figure that has randomly been pulled for a headline. Instead, it’s the approximate amount of money you would need for investable capital that can help build a well-structured portfolio that can generate ... The Portfolio Shift That Turns $500K Into a Reliable Monthly Paycheck

headline: Freedom Capital Downgrades Realty Income (O), Says Upside Appears Limited at Current Levels
summary: Realty Income Corporation (NYSE:O) is included among the 15 Best High Dividend Stocks to Invest in Under $100.
